[et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-own-platform" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="3_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Full Ownership

Own Your Platform, Not Just a Page

My Studio Channel isn't a hosted service — it's your platform, built for you, on your own domain, with no recurring platform fees. You keep full control.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

No Platform Lock-in

Your platform is built for you to own and operate independently. No monthly subscriptions, no per-subscriber fees.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

You Control Everything

You control the content. You control your audience. You control how it grows.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Built With You

Every project is built with you involved in the process. You will meet with us, see the progress, and understand how your platform works before it launches.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_image src="/media/own-platform.jpg" alt="Own your platform" title_text="own-platform.jpg" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" url_new_window="off" align="center" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
